---
name: vendor
description: External skills and agents from the community or marketplace
---

# Vendor Skills

This pack contains skills and agents sourced from external repositories or the community marketplace.
These skills are typically managed via package managers or manual integration.

## Skills
- **agent-browser**: An agent capable of browsing the web.
- **find-skills**: A skill to search and discover other skills.
- **proactive-agent**: An agent framework designed for proactive behavior.
- **searxng**: Integration with SearXNG meta-search engine.
- **self-improving-agent**: An agent that learns and improves over time.
- **skill-vetter**: A tool for vetting and validating skills.
